input.command:
python3 - << 'PY'
import json,glob
paths = sorted(glob.glob('_outputs/problem_*.json'), reverse=True)  # descending
out = []
for p in paths:
    j = json.load(open(p,'r'))
    res = j['results'][0]
    url = res.get('url','')
    title = res.get('title','').strip()
    # get id from url
    import re
    m = re.search(r'problem=(\d+)', url)
    pid = m.group(1) if m else 'UNKNOWN'
    raw = res.get('raw_content','').strip()
    # extract statement: between '### Problem ' and 'Copied to Clipboard' if present
    stmt = raw
    a = stmt.find('### Problem')
    if a!=-1:
        stmt = stmt[a:]
    # cut off at 'Copied to Clipboard'
    b = stmt.find('Copied to Clipboard')
    if b!=-1:
        stmt = stmt[:b]
    stmt = stmt.strip()
    out.append(f"ID: {pid}\nTitle: {title}\nStatement:\n{stmt}\nAnswer: NOT_COMPUTED\n---\n")
open('_outputs/problems.txt','w',encoding='utf-8').write('\n'.join(out))
print('WROTE', '_outputs/problems.txt')
PY
